messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week
That kind of thing has a way of catching attention. What's pulling you toward it — curiosity, or something more like a nudge you're not sure what to do with?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times
Three times in a week does feel like the universe underlining something. What's your instinct when you notice a pattern like that — do you tend to follow it, or talk yourself out of it?
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that
That kind of openness to signs can be a nice way of giving yourself permission to do something you were already a little curious about. What do you think you'd actually find there that interests you?
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot
That's a good way to hold it — the pattern is your brain, but the curiosity is real. Sometimes a small excuse is all we need to do the thing we wanted to do anyway.
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know
Small adventures are underrated. I hope it's a good one.
